title: Big Tech Is Spending $900 Billion on AI This Year
script: In 2026, America's 5 biggest tech companies will spend between $650 billion and $900 billion building AI infrastructure. Amazon alone: $200 billion. Google: up to $185 billion. Microsoft, Meta, and Oracle together: another $285 billion. That's more money than the entire GDP of 175 countries — spent in a single year on servers, chips, and power plants to run artificial intelligence. By 2027, they expect to cross $1 trillion. The arms race just went physical.
